articles.title: Maine’s transgender sports initiative halted by invalid signatures
articles.description:
Maine's secretary of state says an initiative intended to limit transgender students’ ability to participate in sports has been removed from the ballot because of invalid signatures.

The post Maine’s transgender sports initiative halted by invalid signatures appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine's initiative to limit transgender student athletes was removed from the ballot due to invalid signatures.
Secretary of State confirmed the invalidation on May 26, affecting local sports policies.
Boston residents may see similar initiatives arise as debates on transgender rights continue.

articles.title: Mass. police respond after ‘body’ reported in truck, turns out to be a mannequin
articles.description:
“Despite what other pages are reporting, there was no dead body found in a truck in Wakefield today,” Wakefield police said.

The post Mass. police respond after ‘body’ reported in truck, turns out to be a mannequin appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wakefield police confirmed no body was found in a truck on May 26.
Initial reports caused concern among residents but were quickly clarified.
Community reassured as police emphasized the situation was a false alarm.

articles.title: Man spent hours between wall and elevator shaft at Fields Corner MBTA station, police say
articles.description:
Transit Police said the man “claimed to be homeless seeking a place to sleep.”

The post Man spent hours between wall and elevator shaft at Fields Corner MBTA station, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man spent several hours trapped between a wall and elevator shaft at Fields Corner MBTA station.
Transit Police reported the man claimed to be homeless and seeking a place to sleep.
Incident raises concerns about safety and homelessness at public transportation facilities in Boston.

articles.title: 2-year-old bitten by raccoon at Mass. town beach
articles.description:
Police are still searching for the animal.

The post 2-year-old bitten by raccoon at Mass. town beach appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 2-year-old was bitten by a raccoon at a Massachusetts town beach.
Police are actively searching for the raccoon involved in the incident.
Residents are urged to remain vigilant about wildlife safety at local beaches.

articles.title: 3 Boston cheese shops perfect for the ultimate summer picnic spread
articles.description:
These shops will help you assemble the best Boston picnic — complete with nearby parks and waterfront views.

The post 3 Boston cheese shops perfect for the ultimate summer picnic spread appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Discover three top cheese shops in Boston for summer picnics.
Shop selections include local favorites like Formaggio Kitchen and Milk Street Cafe.
Enhance your outdoor experience at nearby parks and waterfronts this summer.

articles.title: Boston to scale back Open Newbury Street events this year, Wu says
articles.description:
The mayor says a busy slate of major events will lead to fewer car-free weekends on Newbury Street.

The post Boston to scale back Open Newbury Street events this year, Wu says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston will reduce car-free weekends on Newbury Street due to major events.
Mayor Michelle Wu announced fewer Open Newbury Street events for 2023.
Residents will experience less pedestrian-friendly access during busy event weekends.
